auth.loginHint: Use the email and password you registered with
auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to manage your localization entries
auth.registerHint: The first user automatically becomes superuser
auth.registerSubtitle: Create an account to start managing localization entries

dashboard.commandPaletteHint: Press ⌘K to open the command palette.
dashboard.namespacesDescription: Manage the localization namespaces you belong to.

crossNamespaceSync.body: Pull or push from a source namespace by prefix / entry_ids allowlist, with selectable strategy.
crossNamespaceSync.title: Cross-namespace sync

draftPublishHistory.body: Dual-track draft and published states, per-entry publish/discard/revert, with traceable version history.
draftPublishHistory.title: Draft / Publish / History

features.heading: Everything a multilingual team needs

singleFileDeploy.body: SQLite + better-sqlite3 in WAL mode — runs in a single Docker container.
singleFileDeploy.title: Single-file deployment

snapshotChannel.body: Read-only snapshot path decoupled from the admin API, ETag 304 + bundle_version, cacheable at runtime.
snapshotChannel.title: Snapshot channel

features.subheading: From entry management to runtime consumption — no extra services to wire up.

systemLocaleDictionary.body: A unified site-wide locale library with toggle control; namespaces only reference the enabled set.
systemLocaleDictionary.title: System-wide locale dictionary

taskCollaboration.body: Slice translation work into tasks, mint scoped Bearer tokens, workers claim and write back.
taskCollaboration.title: Task-based collaboration

hero.subtitle: i18n-studio models “draft → publish → history” as a cross-namespace collaboration flow, with built-in translation tasks, a Snapshot caching channel and OpenAPI docs. Single-container deployment, one SQLite file does it all.
hero.title: Turn localization management into a Pull Request style workflow
